---
title: "MARTINI - MLAI pipeline prepare module"
subtitle: "Prepare ADaM data for Machine Learning"
author: "Maike Ahrens, Sebastian Voss"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{MARTINI - MLAI pipeline prepare module}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## High-level concept

<img src="img/martini-high-level.png" width="100%">
